CustomField.formula: AND ( ISPICKVAL(TaskCategory__c , "原低依頼"), OR ( ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電公共営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "長電施設営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "配電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "配電スマ営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "本プラ・都公建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "本プラ・広公建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "本プラ・施設建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "本プラ・東北建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "北支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "中部支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "西支・プラ建・建設一"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "西支・プラ建・建設二"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "九支・プラ建・建設課") ) )
CustomField.label: 対象製作所_原低依頼
